Name: EASTMAN Demolition Hammer 1100W Concrete Breaker 11J Torque 4900 BPM Impact Rate 6.3Kg Class Chipping Includes Flat Pointed Chisels + Steel Case
Description: POWERFUL 1100W MOTOR: Engineered for professional-grade performance, this demolition hammer runs on a robust 1100W motor. It delivers the consistent high power needed for heavy-duty breaking and chipping tasks, ensuring reliability on tough construction sites. HIGH IMPACT FORCE (11J & 4900 BPM): Designed to crush through hard materials, the tool generates 11 Joules of Torque and a rapid Max. Impact Rate of 4900 BPM. This combination allows for fast and efficient demolition of concrete, brick, stone, and tile. HEAVY-DUTY 5KG CLASS BUILD: While it belongs to the versatile 5Kgs Demolition Hammer category, it features a solid build with a Net Weight of 6.30 kg. This weight provides the necessary downward force to break materials effectively while remaining manageable for wall and floor work. DURABLE STEEL CASE PACKING: Unlike standard plastic cases, this unit comes in a rugged Steel Case Packing. This heavy-duty metal box ensures your tool is protected from impacts, drops,
